title: ToggleAutoJump
description: An accessibility mod that also helps you run up stairs quickly.
body:
# Archival Notice
I'm not planning on doing any more modding for Minecraft. If you would like this mod to be updated, feel free to fork or take any code you need!

# ToggleAutoJump

This mod is useful not only for accessibility, but also for running up stairs very quickly.

## Without Auto Jump Enabled

![Running up stairs Auto Jump disabled](https://github.com/KingRocco21/ToggleAutoJump/blob/master/gifs/AutoJumpDisabled.gif?raw=true)

## With Auto Jump Enabled

![Running up stairs with Auto Jump enabled](https://github.com/KingRocco21/ToggleAutoJump/blob/master/gifs/AutoJumpEnabled.gif?raw=true)

## Fastest way to climb stairs with Auto Jump (at regular movespeed)

![Running up stairs diagonally with Auto Jump enabled](https://github.com/KingRocco21/ToggleAutoJump/blob/master/gifs/ToggleAutoJumpFastest.gif?raw=true)

## How to use

The keybind to toggle auto jump is in the first tab of the controls menu. By default, the key is Left Alt.
